questions.question:
Which one of the options given below refers to the degree (or arity) of a relation in relational database systems?



GATE CSE 2023 | Question: 6
options: Number of attributes of its relation schema.
Number of tuples stored in the relation.
Number of distinct domains of its relation schema.
questions.correct_answer: Number of attributes of its relation schema.

questions.question:
Consider the following two relations, named \( \text{Customer} \) and \( \text{Person}, \) in a database:

Person (
aadhaar CHAR(12) PRIMARY KEY,
name VARCHAR(32));

Customer (
name VARCHAR (32),
email VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
phone CHAR(10),
aadhaar CHAR(12),
   FOREIGN KEY (aadhaar) REFERENCES Person(aadhaar));

Which of the following statements is/are correct?



GATE DA 2025 | Question: 46
options: \( \text{aadhaar} \) is a candidate key in the \( \text{Customer} \) relation
\( \text{aadhaar} \) is a candidate key in the \( \text{Person} \) relation
correct_answer: \( \text{aadhaar} \) is a candidate key in the \( \text{Person} \) relation
